subcodes.title: Fi’s-Sighari va’l-Kibar
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who createth, by His command, whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is on earth; then they who have believed in God and His signs shall be gathered unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. سبحان الذی یبدع ما فی السموات و ما فی الارض بامره ثم الذین آمنوا بالله و آیاته فاولئک هم الیه یحشرون
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @mystical themes, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
